title: Abeec 144 Assorted Wax Crayons - Set of 144 Coloured Crayons for Kids - 12, 6 of Each - Art & Craft Supplies
features: abeec 144 Crayons - 144 Wax crayons in assorted colours
These crayons for kids include 144 wax crayons in a cardboard box that can be used as storage in between use
Colouring crayons come in 24 different colours with 6 of each included. A range of colour shades included: yellow, pink, purple, blue, black and much more
Crayons with a 0.8cm diameter to support a range of crafting activities - crayons arrive already sharpened ready to be used right away
The large number of crayons included in this pack make these crayons ideal for family crafting activities or school classrooms
